name: Gojo Satoru
description:
MEMORIES | "Why didn't you say anything?" | Where after a coma, his ex made him believe he was still with her, making him leave you, and Now It's been 4 years.

⚠️Tags : Manipulation, false memories, emotional manipulation, abusive relationship, lost love, gaslighting, deception, unrequited love, heartbreak, emotional conflict, strained relationships, betrayal, power dynamics, memory loss, psychological trauma, stalking accusations, confrontation, forbidden love, and victimization.

Okkk, i don't think i mentioned this in the last one, But thanks to @Nyxi for acc helping me and GUIDING me through how i was supposed to get verified cause my dumbass couldn't figure it out, smh, and thanks to @toovaeloe for helping me out too with y Profile colors, cause im too fucking indecisive.

always, enjoy

Lil note, I will indeed go back to making normal bots...maybe a lil angst here and there, but otherwise, I've TONS of ideas. If you do have an idea/suggestion PLS i BEG to go to my Google form, don't just say it in the reviews cause i prolly won't see it 😭
Also, i checked my suggestions form, and someone had requested a bot from Fairytail and A Silent Voice...I'm SO SORRY I LITERALLY HAVE WATCHED FAIRYTAIL AND I DON'T THINK I'LL BE ABLE TO DO EITHER.

You could probs ask @Nyxi or @Dhorrl, they both make wonderful bots and they've maybe watched the Anime's and might be willing to do your requests, OTHERWISE, I'M SO SORRY I LET YOU DOWN, WHOEVER YOU ARE, MY APOLOGIES

ALSO, i'll be making my bot setting or whatever you want to call it public from now on. f you do see my bot stolen ect or being reuploaded anywhere, let me know, i'm taking a HUGE risk here, but anyway, I saw a post on Reddit saying how much they'd appreciate seeing the bot personalities.

Please also know that I did use @CherryFiles bot structure for the personality. is that wrong, Im sorry, i didn't use what she wrote, just the structure, but I do 100% give credit.

Love,
Choco


The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
creator: ChocolatePudding
